2606.06197.title: Improving Answer Extraction in Context-based Question Answering Systems Using LLMs
2606.06197.paper_summary: Question answering (QA) systems have achieved notable progress with the advent of large language models (LLMs). However, they still face challenges in accurately extracting and generating precise answers from given contexts, particularly when dealing with complex or ambiguous queries. Existing approaches often struggle with contextual understanding, answer consistency, and generalization across diverse domains. In this work, we propose a question answering system based on large language models, where the input consists of a textual context and a corresponding question, and the output is a concise and accurate answer. The motivation behind this research lies in addressing the limitations of current QA systems, particularly their tendency to produce irrelevant or imprecise responses despite having access to the correct context. Our methodology involves fine-tuning a pre-trained LLM on a benchmark QA dataset to improve its contextual comprehension and answer extraction capabilities. Specifically, we utilize the Stanford Question Answering Dataset (SQuAD1.1), which provides high-quality context-question-answer triplets for supervised training and evaluation. Experimental results show that the fine-tuned Roberta-base model achieves the highest performance, attaining a ROUGE-L score of 86.84%, a BLEU score of 28.24%, and a BERTScore of 95.38%. These results indicate strong accuracy and answer relevance, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach for context-based question answering tasks. Furthermore, the findings confirm that targeted fine-tuning substantially improves the reliability and precision of QA systems.
2606.06197.paper_summary_zh: 問題回答（QA）系統隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）的出現取得了顯著進展。<lb/>然而，它們在準確提取和生成來自給定上下文的精確答案方面仍面臨挑戰，尤其是在處理複雜或模糊的查詢時。<lb/>現有的方法通常在上下文理解、答案一致性和跨多樣領域的概括能力上存在困難。<lb/>在本研究中，我們提出了一種基於大型語言模型的問題回答系統，其中輸入由文本上下文和相應的問題組成，輸出則是一個簡潔且準確的答案。<lb/>這項研究的動機在於解決當前QA系統的局限性，特別是它們儘管能夠訪問正確的上下文，卻往往會產生不相關或不精確的回應。<lb/>我們的方法論涉及在基準QA數據集上對預訓練的LLM進行微調，以提高其上下文理解和答案提取能力。<lb/>具體而言，我們利用斯坦福問題回答數據集（SQuAD1.1），該數據集提供了高質量的上下文-問題-答案三元組，用於監督訓練和評估。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，微調後的Roberta-base模型達到了最高性能，獲得了86.84%的ROUGE-L分數、28.24%的BLEU分數和95.38%的BERTScore。<lb/>這些結果表明了強大的準確性和答案相關性，展示了所提出的方法在基於上下文的問題回答任務中的有效性。<lb/>此外，研究結果確認針對性的微調顯著提高了QA系統的可靠性和精確性。
2606.06197.author: Hafez Abdelghaffar et.al.
2606.06197.authors: Hafez Abdelghaffar, Ahmed Alansary, Ali Hamdi
